data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md already has ci.fast_gate_job/fast_fail_job/test_ceil_job/integration_workflow/ci.workflow_name/merge.ci_workflow_name/version.file_path/stack/jira.project/design.system_name/design.component_library. Gaps: (1) stack entry missing ruby-rails/ruby-jekyll values and onboarding write note; (2) ci.fast_gate_job/fast_fail_job/test_ceil_job missing onboarding context; (3) ci.integration_workflow missing confidence-gated selection note; (4) version.file_path missing numbered multi-value selection UX note
